data.title: Our goal is to bring innovation faster to India: AstraZeneca India-chief
data.summary: AstraZeneca is focused broadly on oncology (increasingly our largest segment globally and in India); biopharmaceuticals (cardiovascular, renal, respiratory, immunology, and vaccines); and rare diseases.

data.title: Rs 25 lakh a month for this? Sreejesh blasts India coach after Pro League flop
data.summary: India ended its Pro League campaign with a 3-2 shootout win over England after a goalless draw in London on Sunday. The result helped India finish eighth with 19 points from 16 matches, after winning only four games during the season. Only Pakistan finished below them in the nine-team table.

data.title: Harry Kane scripts history, becomes only second player after Ronaldo to ...
data.summary: England found themselves behind early after Brian Cipenka gave DR Congo the lead in the seventh minute. Congo controlled large parts of the game before Kane turned the match around with goals in the 75th and 86th minutes to seal England's place in the next round.
